series_metadata.series_description: This record series contains: 1) probationary, ad-hoc (special), and annual performance evaluations; 2) employee commendations; 3) employee performance improvement plans including performance goals; and 4) career development plans. NOTE: OSHP auxiliary member evaluation and development records are retained in the Office of Strategic Services in accordance with this schedule.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: This medium applies only OSHP auxiliary member evaluations. current, seven years. ; Electronic: current, seven years. Records retained in PeopleSoft and E-Performance System
